case_title: ALI R KHAJENOURI VS. MARK LOCKENMEYER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $165.14 SERVED JUL-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOCKENMEYER, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALI KHAJENOURI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK LOCKENMEYER IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,164.00 FILED BY KHAJENOURI, ALI R AS TO DEFENDANT LOCKENMEYER, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHAJENOURI, ALI R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOCKENMEYER, MARK $1,437.19 PRINCIPAL, $240.14 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,677.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.
